KAMUKUNJI POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 12/26/06/24
Date: 26 June 2024
Time recorded: 0810 hrs

Reporting officer: PC Njoroge (Service No. 91022)
Station: Kamukunji Police Station, Nairobi

Particulars:
On 26 June 2024 at about 0640 hrs, suspect Brian Kamau (held since 24/06/2024)
was transferred from Central Police Station to Kamukunji Police Station on
the instruction of OCS Central. No reason was recorded in the transfer
docket. The suspect's family was not informed of the transfer.

The advocate from Wanjiku & Associates attended this station at 1100 hrs
on 26 June 2024 and was again denied access; the OCS stated that the
investigating officer was unavailable and that the file was at Central.

The suspect was not produced before any court between 24 June 2024 and the
date of this entry, contrary to Article 49(1)(f) of the Constitution.

Signed: PC Njoroge
